overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a vehicle driving through a futuristic industrial highway district. The scene features moderate traffic, large digital billboards, towering industrial structures, and warm morning sunlight casting long shadows across the asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane industrial highway with billboard advertisements

agents.ego_description: cruising steadily down the highway, overtaking slower vehicles and maintaining lane position

notable_agents.action: dark SUV traveling in the left lane, maintaining consistent speed

entered.detail: large multi-story industrial facility with pipes and scaffolding dominating the left skyline
large digital billboard displaying FOLLOW YOUR INSTINCTS advertisement with red imagery
tall cylindrical industrial tower with external framework visible in the distance
metal safety barrier running parallel to the left side of the road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels along a wide industrial highway during morning hours. Large digital billboards line the left side displaying advertisements, while industrial complexes and cooling towers rise in the distance. Moderate traffic flows in both directions on the multi-lane asphalt road.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway corridor with prominent digital advertising displays

events.description: billboard content transitions from Follow Instincts to Watson Whore advertisement
sun creates bright lens flare and glare as vehicle approaches billboard alignment

agents.ego_description: maintaining highway speed while passing through the billboard corridor, navigating around other vehicles

notable_agents.action: vintage-style sedan overtaking on the right side

entered.detail: large pink and black digital billboard displaying WATSON WHORE text
white billboard with NICOLA text and circular logo design

segments.scene_description: The drive continues past a series of large digital billboards including advertisements for Watson Whore and Nicola. The morning sun creates a bright lens flare around the 38-second mark. Traffic remains moderate with various vehicles overtaking and changing lanes on the wide highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway approaching large commercial structure with neon signage

events.description: large cyber building with vertical neon signage dominates the right side of the frame

agents.ego_description: continuing down the highway as the road curves slightly toward the large building on the right

notable_agents.action: boxy utility truck driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: large angular black building with prominent white vertical neon signage reading CYBER
elevated pedestrian or utility bridge spanning across the highway ahead

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the vehicle approaching a massive commercial building with bright vertical neon signage on the right. The earlier billboards and cooling tower recede into the background as the cyber building becomes the dominant visual element. The road continues straight toward an overhead walkway structure in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along a wide industrial highway that transitions from a vista of distant cooling towers to the towering presence of a neon-lit commercial hub. It begins with the vehicle cruising past large digital billboards and industrial complexes under the glow of the morning sun. As the drive continues, the camera passes specific advertisements for Watson Whore and Nicola while a bright lens flare cuts across the view amidst the flow of moderate traffic. The scene then shifts as the distant industrial towers recede, giving way to a massive commercial building with bright vertical neon signage that dominates the right side of the frame. Finally, the road stretches forward toward an overhead walkway structure as the urban architecture closes in.
